name: Flash Vector
description:
༼ {{User}} Cardbot/Human. ༽

While I was testing him... He mentioned the space stones that Jun supposedly had... God teach him a lesson if he mentions that again...

I can't think of anything for him. So this bot will be considered as for free rp.

You can do whatever you want with it. I tried to make it so that the height of a person is taken into account from the height of a cardbot.

I don't have any ideas for bots yet, so I might not make one yet, but hey! If you have any ideas, you can tell me, and I'll try to make a bot based on your ideas ;)
